title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Warehouse Automation Signals Industrial Sector Demand
thesis: An increasing interest in warehouse automation indicates growing investment and activity in industrial logistics and manufacturing automation. Increased searches for warehouse automation typically precede capital expenditure and growth in industrial sector companies.
signal_logic: If weekly Google Trends interest for 'warehouse automation' rises by more than 15% from previous week
entry_exit: Entry: If weekly Google Trends interest for 'warehouse automation' rises by more than 15% from previous week Exit: After 4 weeks or if interest drops below prior 4-week average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Google Trends data for this term frequently shows weekly fluctuations above 15% due to ongoing supply chain investment news.

schema.idea: Weekly Surge in Google Trends for 'Warehouse Automation' Signals Industrial Sector Demand
schema.behavior: An increasing interest in warehouse automation indicates growing investment and activity in industrial logistics and manufacturing automation.

market_impact.rationale: Increased searches for warehouse automation typically precede capital expenditure and growth in industrial sector companies.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly Google Trends interest for 'warehouse automation' rises by more than 15% from previous week
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or if interest drops below prior 4-week average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Google Trends data for this term frequently shows weekly fluctuations above 15% due to ongoing supply chain investment news.

title: Weekly Jump In Google Trends For Small Business Layoffs Signals Consumer Discretionary Downturn
thesis: Rising searches for small business layoffs reflect stress in the labor market at the local level, often preceding reduced consumer spending. Small business layoffs indicate consumer income pressure and likely reduced discretionary spending.
signal_logic: If weekly Google Trends interest for 'small business layoffs' increases by more than 20% vs prior 4-week average
entry_exit: Entry: If weekly Google Trends interest for 'small business layoffs' increases by more than 20% vs prior 4-week average Exit: After 6 weeks or when interest falls below 10% above baseline
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor stress signals on Google Trends for layoffs often spike multiple times a year in reaction to economic shifts.

title: Usgs Earthquake Activity Spike Near Major Freight Hubs Signals Temporary Freight Disruption
thesis: A sudden increase in earthquake tremors near major freight hubs can disrupt logistics and shipping routes, impacting industrial production. Freight disruptions impair industrial supply chains and manufacturing output, pressuring industrial stocks.
signal_logic: If number of earthquakes with magnitude >3.0 near top 5 US freight hubs increases by 50% over 3 days
entry_exit: Entry: If number of earthquakes with magnitude >3.0 near top 5 US freight hubs increases by 50% over 3 days Exit: After 7 trading days or when earthquake activity normalizes to baseline
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use USGS earthquake activity via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic activity near freight hubs occasionally clusters, creating short-term disruptions detectable in USGS data.

trade_logic.entry: If number of earthquakes with magnitude >3.0 near top 5 US freight hubs increases by 50% over 3 days
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or when earthquake activity normalizes to baseline

title: Daily Spike In Weather-series Wind Speed Variability Signals Bullish Utilities Sector

entry_exit: Entry: If daily wind speed variance exceeds 120% of 10-day rolling average Exit: After 5 trading days or when variance drops below 110% of average

risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
